import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import messagebox
import requests

class NewspaperSummarizer:
    def __init__(self):
        self.window = tk.Tk()
        self.window.title("Newspaper Summarizer")

        self.newspaper_label = tk.Label(self.window, text="Enter Newspaper Name:")
        self.newspaper_label.pack()

        self.newspaper_entry = tk.Entry(self.window)
        self.newspaper_entry.pack()

        self.summarize_button = tk.Button(self.window, text="Summarize", command=self.summarize_newspaper)
        self.summarize_button.pack()

        self.summary_label = tk.Label(self.window, text="Summary:")
        self.summary_label.pack()

        self.summary_text = tk.Text(self.window, height=10, width=50)
        self.summary_text.pack()

        self.question_label = tk.Label(self.window, text="Ask a question about the summary:")
        self.question_label.pack()

        self.question_entry = tk.Entry(self.window)
        self.question_entry.pack()

        self.answer_button = tk.Button(self.window, text="Get Answer", command=self.get_answer)
        self.answer_button.pack()

        self.answer_label = tk.Label(self.window, text="Answer:")
        self.answer_label.pack()

        self.answer_text = tk.Text(self.window, height=5, width=50)
        self.answer_text.pack()

    def summarize_newspaper(self):
        newspaper_name = self.newspaper_entry.get()
        api_url = f"https://api.claude.ai/summarize?text={newspaper_name}"
        response = requests.get(api_url)
        summary = response.json()["summary"]
        self.summary_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
        self.summary_text.insert(tk.END, summary)

    def get_answer(self):
        question = self.question_entry.get()
        summary = self.summary_text.get(1.0, tk.END)
        api_url = f"https://api.claude.ai/answer?question={question}&context={summary}"
        response = requests.get(api_url)
        answer = response.json()["answer"]
        self.answer_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
        self.answer_text.insert(tk.END, answer)

    def run(self):
        self.window.mainloop()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    app = NewspaperSummarizer()
    app.run()

class PaperSummarizer:
    def __init__(self):
        self.root = tk.Tk()
        self.root.title("Paper Summarizer")
        self.file_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.summary = tk.StringVar()
        self.question = tk.StringVar()
        self.answer = tk.StringVar()

        tk.Label(self.root, text="Select Paper:").pack()
        tk.Button(self.root, text="Browse", command=self.browse_file).pack()
        tk.Label(self.root, text="Selected File:").pack()
        tk.Label(self.root, textvariable=self.file_path).pack()
        tk.Button(self.root, text="Summarize", command=self.summarize_paper).pack()
        tk.Label(self.root, text="Summary:").pack()
        tk.Text(self.root, height=10, width=50).pack()
        tk.Label(self.root, text="Ask Question:").pack()
        tk.Entry(self.root, textvariable=self.question).pack()
        tk.Button(self.root, text="Get Answer", command=self.get_answer).pack()
        tk.Label(self.root, text="Answer:").pack()
        tk.Label(self.root, textvariable=self.answer).pack()

    def browse_file(self):
        path = filedialog.askopenfilename()
        self.file_path.set(path)

    def summarize_paper(self):
        with open(self.file_path.get(), 'r') as f:
            text = f.read()
        api_url = "https://api.claude.ai/summarize"
        headers = {"Content-Type": "application/json"}
        data = {"text": text}
        response = requests.post(api_url, headers=headers, json=data)
        summary = response.json()["summary"]
        self.summary.set(summary)
        text_box = tk.Text(self.root, height=10, width=50)
        text_box.insert(tk.INSERT, summary)
        text_box.pack()

    def get_answer(self):
        api_url = "https://api.claude.ai/answer"
        headers = {"Content-Type": "application/json"}
        data = {"question": self.question.get(), "context": self.summary.get()}
        response = requests.post(api_url, headers=headers, json=data)
        answer = response.json()["answer"]
        self.answer.set(answer)

    def run(self):
        self.root.mainloop()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    app = PaperSummarizer()
    app.run()

class NewspaperSummarizer:
    def __init__(self):
        self.window = tk.Tk()
        self.window.title("Newspaper Summarizer")

        self.publisher_label = tk.Label(self.window, text="Enter Newspaper Publisher:")
        self.publisher_label.pack()

        self.publisher_entry = tk.Entry(self.window, width=50)
        self.publisher_entry.pack()

        self.summarize_button = tk.Button(self.window, text="Summarize", command=self.summarize_newspaper)
        self.summarize_button.pack()

        self.question_label = tk.Label(self.window, text="Enter your question about the summarized newspaper:")
        self.question_label.pack()

        self.question_entry = tk.Entry(self.window, width=50)
        self.question_entry.pack()

        self.answer_label = tk.Label(self.window, text="Answer:")
        self.answer_label.pack()

        self.answer_text = tk.Text(self.window, height=10, width=50)
        self.answer_text.pack()

    def summarize_newspaper(self):
        publisher = self.publisher_entry.get()
        api_url = f"https://api.claude.ai/summarize?publisher={publisher}"
        response = requests.get(api_url)
        summary = response.json()["summary"]
        self.answer_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
        self.answer_text.insert(tk.END, summary)

    def ask_question(self):
        question = self.question_entry.get()
        api_url = f"https://api.claude.ai/answer?question={question}"
        response = requests.get(api_url)
        answer = response.json()["answer"]
        self.answer_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
        self.answer_text.insert(tk.END, answer)

    def run(self):
        self.window.mainloop()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    app = NewspaperSummarizer()
    ask_button = tk.Button(app.window, text="Ask", command=app.ask_question)
    ask_button.pack()
    app.run()
